drifted.spec_text: Given the shared Prelude.fsx preamble has been updated, When any script that loads it runs, Then all scripting library modules are available
drifted.actual: Scripting/scripts/Prelude.fsx was deleted. HelloDrop.fsx inlines #r nuget: PhysicsSandbox.Scripting directly. Preamble no longer needed.

not_implemented.spec_text: The pack-and-publish workflow completes in a single command sequence
not_implemented.actual: No pack script exists. Commands run manually in dependency order.
